title: Debt Payoff Calculator - Free Repayment Planner
description: Free debt payoff calculator. Find out how long it takes to pay off debt and how much interest you'll pay. Plan extra payments to become debt-free faster.
keywords: debt payoff calculator, debt repayment calculator, pay off debt faster, debt free calculator, loan payoff
intro: Calculate how long it will take to pay off your debt. Enter your balance, interest rate, and monthly payment to see your payoff timeline.

faq.q: How can I pay off debt faster?
faq.a: Pay more than the minimum, use the debt avalanche (highest interest first) or snowball (smallest balance first) method, and avoid adding new debt.

faq.q: What is the debt avalanche method?
faq.a: Pay minimums on all debts, then put extra money toward the highest-interest debt first. This saves the most in interest.

faq.q: How much interest will I pay?
faq.a: Total interest depends on your balance, rate, and payment amount. Higher payments reduce total interest significantly.
